name: got-cosy-graph
description: Read-only MCP server for Got Cosy's cosiness index: live, cosy-scored hotels with evidence signals, description and verified booking links. No API key required.

tools.name: find_cosy_hotels
tools.description: Find live, cosy-scored hotels. Optional filters: city, country, min_score (0-10), limit (max 100).

tools.name: get_hotel_feeling
tools.description: Get one hotel's cosy score, evidence signals and description by its Got Cosy slug.
